title: Delta-V Budget Management
summary: Understanding velocity change capacity and its tactical implications.
details: Delta-V is total velocity change your ship can perform before fuel depletion. Every thrust burn consumes delta-V. Budget includes: approach maneuvers, combat maneuvering, escape velocity, safety reserve. Calculate mission requirements before engagement. Ships with depleted delta-V cannot evade or pursue. Monitor propellant levels throughout combat. Reserve minimum 20% for emergency withdrawal.
annotations: Running out of delta-V is running out of options.
Efficient pilots survive longer on same fuel.
